# Inverse Modeling

**Summary**: The process of determining reservoir parameters by minimizing the difference between observed and predicted data.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2023]] utilized inverse modeling to estimate permeability and pay thickness from pressure data.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2023]] Essential for calibrating models to real-world conditions.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2023]] Optimization via Differential Evolution.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Differential evolution was used as the optimization engine for the inverse modeling. ([[2023-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2023, p. 59]])
